CVE-2021-45844.title: Improper sanitization in the invocation of ODA File Converter fro ...
CVE-2021-45844.description: Improper sanitization in the invocation of ODA File Converter from FreeCAD 0.19 allows an attacker to inject OS commands via a crafted filename.
